pipeline_mode.__provenance: No CLI override. Adaptive mode is appropriate — three independent fixes can benefit from parallel execution within groups.

jit.enabled.__provenance: JIT disabled — all three fixes are fully specified with no ambiguity. No need for just-in-time research or clarification.

replanning.enabled.__provenance: Replanning disabled — task is fully specified with zero ambiguity. All files identified, all changes described. No divergence expected.

fast_track.enabled.__provenance: Enabled — composite complexity 2, confidence 1.0, security APPROVED. Pure markdown plugin with no runtime risk. See .forge/fast_spec.json for details.

meta_agent.confidence_threshold.__provenance: Default retained. Confidence is 1.0, well above threshold.

routing.enabled.__provenance: Routing disabled — no template match needed. Standard forge phases are appropriate for this well-specified bugfix.

verification.dimension_weights.__provenance: Adjusted from defaults: security weight reduced (0.3→0.1) because pure markdown has zero security surface. Correctness increased (0.3→0.4) because the core bugs must be fixed correctly. Spec alignment increased (0.2→0.3) because all three fixes have precise roadmap specs to match against.

skip_phases.__provenance: No phases skipped — all phases are useful even for this simple task.

approval_gates.__provenance: Default gates retained: after brainstorm (3), after spec (4), after plan (6).

tdd.mutation_threshold.__provenance: Default retained. Mutation testing applies to the test grep fragility fix — removing any assertion target from scaffolder.md should cause test failure.

review.triage_enabled.__provenance: Default retained — no review triage needed for a simple patch.

oracle.enabled.__provenance: Default retained — oracle can validate the final state.
